title: Update the statuses of ads
content:
Use this endpoint to enable, disable or delete an ad or ads. > **Note**
> The operation status of a deleted ad or an ad in a deleted ad group or campaign cannot be modified. You can use [/campaign/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739315828649986), [/adgroup/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739314558673922), or [/ad/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1735735588640770) to get the operation status of a campaign, an ad group or an ad via `operation_status`. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/ad/update/status/|/v1.3/ad/status/update/| |Request parameter name|`opt_status`| `operation_status`| |Request parameter data type |`advertiser_id`:number
`ad_ids`: number[]
`aco_ad_ids`: number[]|`advertiser_id`:string
`ad_ids`: string[]
`aco_ad_ids`: string[]| |Response parameter data type| `ad_ids`: number[]
`aco_ad_ids`: number[]|`ad_ids`: string[]
`aco_ad_ids`: string[]| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type. Allowed format: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |ad_ids {+Conditional}| string[] | A list of ad IDs. Allowed quantity: `1-20`. Either `ad_ids` or `aco_ad_ids` has to be set. | |aco_ad_ids{+Conditional}| string[] | A list of ACO ad IDs. Only support `ENABLE` and `DISABLE` for ACO ads. Allowed quantity: `1-20`. Either `ad_ids` or `aco_ad_ids` has to be set. | |advertiser_id {Required}|string| Advertiser ID | |operation_status {Required}|string| The operation being made.
Enum values: `DELETE` (delete),` DISABLE` (pause), `ENABLE` (enable).

Note: The status of deleted ads or ads in deleted campaigns or ad groups cannot be modified.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "advertiser_id": "ADVERTISER_ID", "operation_status": "OPT_STATUS", "ad_ids": [ "AD_IDS" ] }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/ad/status/update/ (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description | |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Return message, see [Appendix-Return information](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object|Return data | #|ad_ids | string[]| List of updated ad IDs | #|aco_ad_ids| string[] | List of updated ACO ad IDs | #|status |string|The operation that was executed. Enum values: `DELETE`,`DISABLE`, `ENABLE` | |request_id |string|The log id of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": { "status": "ENABLE", "ad_ids": [ 11, 22 ] }, "request_id": "2019091810032301011023224213552" } (/code); ```
